headline: Accenture (ACN) Lands Coretura Partnership To Build Software For Commercial Vehicles
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has entered a multi-year engineering partnership with Coretura, the Daimler Truck and Volvo Group joint venture. The collaboration focuses on building a unified software platform for commercial vehicles, covering trucks and buses across multiple brands. This agreement extends Accenture’s role beyond consulting and IT services into core automotive software engineering and platform development. Accenture is moving deeper into transportation technology at a time when its...

headline: TensorX Launches With €8M Seed Funding Round Led by Darius Cubed Ventures for Bet on European Sovereign AI Infrastructure With Plans to Deploy up to €100M in NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs
summary: DUBLIN, June 24, 2026--A team of Irish founders has committed €8 million to Nvidia Blackwell GPUs, including the latest B300 chips, to launch TensorX, a sovereign AI inference platform designed for Europe's AI builders, trusted by regulated industries and already generating revenue from paying customers. The company was founded by Shane Morton, is part of the NVIDIA Inception program and is partnering with Dell on sourcing GPU hardware.
